heading: Effective date
label: 7948 Effective date
notes: References in TextFor the effective date of the No Child Left Behind Act of 2001, referred to in subsec. (b), see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 5 of Pub. L. 107–110section 6301 of this title
CodificationSection was classified to prior to renumbering by .section 6738 of this titlePub. L. 114–95

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: This subpart shall take effect 90 days after .January 8, 2002

children.heading: Application
children.label: b Application
children.text: This subpart applies to any claim for harm caused by an act or omission of a teacher if that claim is filed on or after the effective date of the No Child Left Behind Act of 2001 without regard to whether the harm that is the subject of the claim or the conduct that caused the harm occurred before such effective date.
